task_completion.description: Agent searches for and selects the student 'Dash Parr'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS student search interface with 'Dash Parr' entered, or Dash Parr's student profile opened.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the contacts or parent/guardian section of Dash Parr's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Addresses & Contacts' or similar tab selected within Dash Parr's student record.

task_completion.description: Agent initiates a search for an existing contact rather than creating a new one.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a dialog or interface for searching existing contacts/parents (e.g., searching for 'Robert Parr' or copying from sibling 'Violet Parr').

task_completion.description: Agent selects the existing parent 'Robert Parr' from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Robert Parr' appearing in search results and being selected by the agent to be linked.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully links Robert Parr to Dash Parr.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show 'Robert Parr' listed as a parent/contact in Dash Parr's profile.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the OpenSIS application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Agent did not create a new contact record for Robert Parr.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen typing 'Robert' and 'Parr' into a blank 'New Contact' form. They must use a search/link existing contact feature.
Screenshots show a logical sequence of clicks, typing, and page loads, rather than jumping directly to a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Student: Dash Parr. Existing Parent: Robert Parr. Sibling: Violet Parr. The agent must link the existing parent 'Robert Parr' to 'Dash Parr' using the OpenSIS web interface without creating a new duplicate contact record.
